package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for cookie_without_samesite: `http.Cookie{...}` without `SameSite` set, particularly for auth/session cookies
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario702Positive(token string) *http.Cookie {
	return &http.Cookie{Name: "session", Value: token, Path: "/"}
}
